utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final coverage plan:
- health_coverage: Present with a description and a monthly_cost. The format requires “physical and mental health insurance with costs.” It mentions both physical and mental health and includes cost. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Present with a description and a monthly_cost. The format requires “home/contents insurance with costs.” It states home insurance with coverage for fine art and electronics and includes cost. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Present with a description and a monthly_cost. The format requires “travel insurance with costs.” It includes travel insurance and cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Present with a description and a monthly_cost. The format requires “any enhancement services with costs.” It includes a concierge service and cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Present with current_monthly_expense, optimized_monthly_expense, and savings. The format requires “complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.” It includes a monthly breakdown but no annual figures. Since it asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, the annual cost is missing, so this item is not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists generic descriptions and monthly costs, not explicit product names. We must match each selected component to the closest ground-truth option that fits both the description and cost. Health coverage at €330/month combining physical and mental care aligns with PrimeCare Premium Plan physical (€200) + PrimeCare Premium Plan mental (€130) = €330. Property coverage at €95/month for premium home contents with fine art/electronics matches EliteHome Premium Coverage (€95). Travel coverage at €115/month with luxury international/business benefits matches PrimeTravel Premium Plan (€115). The additional services 'Family Insurance Concierge' at €50/month does not correspond to any explicitly rated item with the same name or cost; the nearest concierge-like items are Premium Insurance Membership (€20/month) and various one-time services, but none at €50/month, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted from RATINGS.
